relationships.relationship_description: Goldman Sachs provides investment banking services to Intuit, had a non-securities services client relationship, and makes a market in Intuit's securities.
relationships.quantifier: expects to receive or intends to seek compensation, had an investment banking services client relationship during the past 12 months, had a non-securities services client relationship during the past 12 months, makes a market
relationships.original_sentence: Goldman Sachs expects to receive or intends to seek compensation for investment banking services in the next 3 months: Intuit Inc. ($394.42) Goldman Sachs had an investment banking services client relationship during the past 12 months with: Intuit Inc. ($394.42) Goldman Sachs had a non-securities services client relationship during the past 12 months with: Intuit Inc. ($394.42) Goldman Sachs makes a market in the securities or derivatives thereof: Intuit Inc. ($394.42)

relationships.relationship_description: Intuit leverages Anthropic's 3P models (e.g., a weather engine) for its AI capabilities.
relationships.quantifier: 3P models where necessary
relationships.original_sentence: we think Intuit should be able to marry their own data/LLMs, 3P models where necessary (e.g., a weather engine from Anthropic), and a deep understanding of how small business owners think/approach workflows to design agents that SMBs will actually adopt.
